nasb.text: if only you listen obediently to the voice of the Lord your God, to observe carefully all this commandment which I am commanding you today.

esv.text: if only you will strictly obey the voice of the Lord your God, being careful to do all this commandment that I command you today.

cnv.text: 只要你留心聽從耶和華你的　神的話，謹守遵行我今日吩咐你的一切誡命。
